pages.text: Spotty the Hyena is very sad. He has lost his laugh.

blocks.text: Spotty the Hyena is very sad. He has lost his laugh.

pages.text: “Please help me find my laugh, Giraffe.” “I can’t hear a laugh up here.”

blocks.text: “Please help me find my laugh, Giraffe.”
“I can’t hear
a laugh
up here.”

pages.text: “Please help me find my laugh, Hippo.” “I can’t hear a laugh down here.”

blocks.text: “Please help me find my laugh, Hippo.”
“I can’t hear a laugh down here.”

“I can’t hear a laugh in here.”

pages.text: “Please help me find my laugh, Monkey.” “How did you lose it?”

blocks.text: “Please help me find my laugh, Monkey.”
“How did you lose it?”

pages.text: “When I laugh, you can see my big teeth. That makes everyone frightened,” said Spotty. “Then I got sad and my laugh just disappeared.”

blocks.text: “When I laugh, you can see my big teeth. That makes everyone frightened,” said Spotty.
“Then I got sad and my laugh just disappeared.”

pages.text: “I can’t find it anywhere!” “But you were looking in the wrong place.”

blocks.text: “I can’t find it anywhere!”
“But you were looking in the wrong place.”

pages.text: Monkey jumped out of the tree and picked up a feather. Then she began to tickle Spotty all over.

blocks.text: Monkey
jumped
out of the tree
and picked up a feather.
Then she began to tickle Spotty all over.

pages.text: Slowly Spotty started smiling, and then he let out a big, loud laugh. He laughed and laughed until he was rolling around on the ground.

blocks.text: Slowly Spotty started smiling, and then he let out a big, loud laugh.
He laughed and laughed until he was rolling around on the ground.

pages.text: All the other animals started laughing too.

blocks.text: All the other animals started laughing too.

pages.text: “Where did you find his laugh?” they asked. “His laugh was inside him all the time. I just made him happy and out it came.”

blocks.text: “Where did you find his laugh?” they asked.
“His laugh was inside him all the time. I just made him happy and out it came.”

pages.text: They all laughed and laughed so that their teeth showed too. “I’ll n eve r lose my laugh again,” said Spotty the happy Hyena.

happy Hyena.
